Class EfsInterval.Builder

java.lang.Object
org.efs.feed.EfsInterval.Builder
Enclosing class:
EfsInterval
public static final class EfsInterval.Builder extends Object
EfsInterval instances may be created only by using a Builder instance. A Builder instance is obtained by calling EfsInterval.builder() which returns a newly instantiated Builder instance. It is recommended that a new Builder instance be used to create an interval rather than re-using a builder instance to create a previous interval.
Author:
Charles W. Rapp

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final String
    BEGINNING_ENDPOINT_NULL
    When attempting to set interval's beginning endpoint to null, then NullPointerException contains message "beginning endpoint is null".
    static final String
    BEGINNING_GREATER_THAN_ENDING
    When attempting to set interval with a beginning endpoint > ending endpoint, then ValidationException contains message "beginning > ending".
    static final String
    ENDING_ENDPOINT_NULL
    When attempting to set interval's ending endpoint to null, then NullPointerException contains message "ending endpoint is null".

  • Method Details

    • beginning

      public EfsInterval.Builder beginning(EfsIntervalEndpoint ep)
      Sets interval beginning endpoint. Returns this Builder instance so that builder method calls can be chained.
      Parameters:
      ep - interval beginning endpoint.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if ep is null.
      See Also:
      • ending(EfsIntervalEndpoint)

    • ending

      public EfsInterval.Builder ending(EfsIntervalEndpoint ep)
      Sets interval ending endpoint. Returns this Builder instance so that builder method calls can be chained.
      Parameters:
      ep - interval ending endpoint.
      Returns:
      this Builder instance.
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if is null.

    • build

      public EfsInterval build() throws net.sf.eBus.util.ValidationException
      Returns a new interval instance based on this builder's settings.
      Returns:
      new interval instance.
      Throws:
      net.sf.eBus.util.ValidationException - if this builder contains an incomplete or incorrect interval settings.

    • compareEndpoints

      public int compareEndpoints(@Nonnull EfsIntervalEndpoint begin, @Nonnull EfsIntervalEndpoint end)
      Returns integer value <, equal to, or > zero if begin is <, equal to, > end.
      Parameters:
      begin - beginning endpoint.
      end - ending endpoint.
      Returns:
      integer value <, equal to, or > zero.
